channel.title: Npx frontity dev responds with Error E404
channel.description:
Hi guys,
Running `npx frontity dev` responds with an Error E404. (see Screenshot) Repository: https://github.com/dejangeorgiev/ruthgeorgiev-frontity
![image|581x370](upload://kXFMU74IcZjTLSL4kosgbAyr3ES.png)
Many thanks for your help. Best, Dejan

item.title: Npx frontity dev responds with Error E404
item.dc:creator: dejangeorgiev
item.description:
Hey @ben.wright.dev,

What a noob mistake. haha
Sorry for that, i was probably tired and overseen it.
Thank you very much!

Best,
Dejan

Read full topic
item.source: Npx frontity dev responds with Error E404

item.title: Npx frontity dev responds with Error E404
item.dc:creator: ben.wright.dev
item.description:
Hi @dejangeorgiev

I see in that screenshot you actually have a typo.

You’ve got:

npx fronity dev

It should be:

npx frontity dev

Read full topic
item.source: Npx frontity dev responds with Error E404

item.title: Npx frontity dev responds with Error E404
item.dc:creator: dejangeorgiev
item.description:
Hi guys,

Running npx frontity dev responds with an Error E404. (see Screenshot)
Repository: https://github.com/dejangeorgiev/ruthgeorgiev-frontity

Many thanks for your help.
Best,
Dejan
